creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 247737
Update to 2.0.0

Update to 2.0.0:
- Add testing framework
- Prefer ${DISTVERSION} over ${PORTVERSION}
- Switch to PEP517 build

https://github.com/readthedocs/sphinx_rtd_theme/compare/1.0.0...2.0.0

Unfortunately the HTML and man docs require Sphinx [7.1..7.2] at the moment, tho, the Port is ready for fetching from Github to get the source tarball with the docs, for when Sphinx gets updated.
